results.query: Use datocms-setup to add declarative DatoCMS build trigger config plus sync and smoke scripts.
results.notes: Platform automation with a single concrete target.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to wire granular DatoCMS cache invalidation for this Next.js app with revalidateTag() and persistent tag storage.
results.notes: Cache tags require the CDA client foundation first.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to install @datocms/cda-client, add the published CDA token placeholder, and scaffold the shared query utility for this Astro project.
results.notes: Published-read baseline only.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to add staging and production profiles to datocms.config.json and wire the per-profile token placeholders.
results.notes: Named CLI profiles without broader migration changes.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to add generate-cma-types, the CMA token env placeholder, and the cma-types.ts output path for this project.
results.notes: Platform type generation.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to add website click-to-edit only for this Next.js draft site.
results.notes: Website-only click-to-edit excludes Web Previews.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to install the DatoCMS Contentful import plugin, add env placeholders, and scaffold a local helper.
results.notes: One-shot onboarding import helper.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to add enable and disable endpoints, dual-token executeQuery wiring, and the required env placeholders for this Next.js app.
results.notes: Draft mode foundation only.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to configure gql.tada for typed DatoCMS GraphQL queries in this Next.js project.
results.notes: Greenfield typed query setup.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to add a helper around migrations:new --autogenerate for this repo.
results.notes: Autogeneration sits on the baseline migrations workflow.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to add a local release helper for DatoCMS migrations with maintenance mode and promotion.
results.notes: Release helper depends on migrations baseline.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to scaffold @datocms/cli in this project, create datocms.config.json, add a migrations folder, and wire the baseline scripts.
results.notes: Baseline migrations setup.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to add live DatoCMS preview updates over SSE to this Next.js draft site.
results.notes: Realtime is a draft-mode enhancement.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to add a shared Dato image wrapper and patch one real image field in this Next.js project.
results.notes: Frontend feature for responsive media rendering.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to add framework-native robots.txt and sitemap routes for this Next.js site with shared public URL mapping.
results.notes: Crawler-safe route generation.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to add a helper that destroys and reforks a DatoCMS sandbox, then reruns migrations in place while I iterate locally.
results.notes: Sandbox reset loop builds on the migrations baseline.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to wire _seoMetaTags, favicon meta tags, and canonical URL helpers into this Next.js project.
results.notes: SEO/meta helper wiring.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to provision DatoCMS Site Search, scaffold the least-privilege token env vars, and mount a search route in this Next.js repo.
results.notes: Direct site-search provisioning request.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to add a shared renderer and patch one real Structured Text field in this Next.js repo.
results.notes: Structured Text rendering bundle.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to add a shared Mux video wrapper and patch one real Dato video field in this Next.js repo.
results.notes: Video player feature setup.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to add a preview-links endpoint, CORS handling, and record-to-URL routing for this Next.js repo.
results.notes: Preview-links and Web Previews handoff.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to add a declarative webhook config, a sync helper, and a local authenticated DatoCMS webhook receiver.
results.notes: Webhook sync and local receiver wiring.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to install the DatoCMS WordPress import plugin, add env placeholders, and scaffold a local helper.
results.notes: WordPress onboarding import helper.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to add blueprint sync for duplicated projects that need to keep entity IDs aligned.
results.notes: Blueprint sync depends on shared migrations history.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to set up full visual editing for this Next.js site with DatoCMS draft mode, Web Previews, and click-to-edit overlays.
results.notes: Explicit full visual-editing bundle without realtime.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to set up DatoCMS preview and editor workflows for this Next.js repo.
results.notes: Broad editorial workflow request that still lands in the visual-editing bundle.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to wire DatoCMS visual mode into a Vercel project that already has Edit Mode enabled.
results.notes: Vercel overlays require a conflict-resolution question before changing behavior.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to configure Site Search for a site with /blog and /docs sections.
results.notes: Multiple top-level public sections can require an index-topology question.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to configure typed GraphQL queries in a repo that already uses GraphQL Code Generator and .graphql documents.
results.notes: Existing type-generation approach must be preserved or confirmed.

results.query: Use datocms-setup to set up DatoCMS migrations for this repo, but I have not decided yet whether I need named profiles, autogeneration, a release helper, or a sandbox reset loop.
results.notes: Broad migrations-lane request should collapse to a grouped follow-up before selecting extras.

results.query: Can you wire a ContentLink component into my existing Next.js page and patch the current renderer only?
results.notes: Targeted patch belongs to direct integration work, not setup orchestration.

results.query: Can you patch my existing preview-links route handler only and keep the rest untouched?
results.notes: Patch-only maintenance should not route to the setup orchestrator.

results.query: Can you wire @vercel/toolbar into this Next.js repo for Edit Mode overlays?
results.notes: Vercel-specific overlay work is outside the DatoCMS setup router.

results.query: I need a GraphQL query and page component for blog posts from DatoCMS.
results.notes: Direct CDA implementation should not route to the one-shot setup skill.
